# ANALYSIS: TRUE-SNIPER cook batch summary

## (a) Genuine evidence vs design-only

| Cook filename | Mapped candidate (from leaderboard) | Evidence type | Key metrics |
|---|---|---|---|
| chef-nemo-sniper-entry-timing-sweep | MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE (2026-05-31-midday-trendline-gate.md) | Genuine evidence | OOS N=307 trades, anchor PASS (5/04 +53.6/c kept, 4/29 loser suppressed), WF lift +89%, confidence 8/10 |
| chef-nemo-sniper-strong-bar-entry | RIBBON_MOMENTUM_GATE (2026-05-31-ribbon-momentum-gate.md) | Genuine evidence | OOS n=51 WR=0.47 +26.9/c, WF ratio=3.74, real-fills PASS, confidence 9/10 |
| chef-nemo-sniper-missed-move-analysis-watcher | SNIPER_ENTRY_DESIGNS (2026-05-31-111020-sniper-entry-designs.md) | Design-only | Pre-backtest design doc, no OOS test, confidence 4/10 |
| chef-nemo-sniper-min-stop-width-search | (Not in leaderboard; implied discredited) | No genuine evidence | Discredited per note: stop/PL changes (82-sig reversal) |
| chef-nemo-chart-stop-buffer-optimization | (Not in leaderboard; implied discredited) | No genuine evidence | Discredited per note: stop/PL changes (82-sig reversal) |

## (b) New parameter recommendations with supporting data

| Cook | Recommendation | Supporting data |
|---|---|---|
| chef-nemo-sniper-entry-timing-sweep | Block single-trigger trendline_rejection entries in 11:30–14:00 ET window | Real-fills OOS: ungated +3.8/trade → gated +7.2/trade (+89% lift); total +1,562/c (highest tested); anchor PASS keeps 5/04 winner |
| chef-nemo-sniper-strong-bar-entry | Entry filter: 3 visual conditions (ribbon widening, ribbon fresh, no midday trendline) | OOS WF PASS (ratio=3.74); real-fills PASS; IS n=35 WR=0.31 +7.2/c → OOS n=51 WR=0.47 +26.9/c |
| chef-nemo-sniper-missed-move-analysis-watcher | 8 entry mechanics to eliminate retest-wick stops (ranked by impact×implementability) | Design-only; no quantitative backing yet |
| chef-nemo-sniper-min-stop-width-search | (None; discredited) | Stop/PL changes showed 82-significance reversal |
| chef-nemo-chart-stop-buffer-optimization | (None; discredited) | Stop/PL changes showed 82-significance reversal |

## (c) What is NOT yet validated

- **SNIPER_ENTRY_DESIGNS**: Requires Stage-1 backtest to assess impact on OP-16 anchors and edge_capture; currently design-only.
- **Stop width and chart stop buffer cooks**: Already discredited (stop/PL changes 82-sig reversal); no further validation pursued unless new hypothesis emerges.
- **General**: All cooks need OP-20 disclosures (account-size assumption, sample bias, OOS test, real-fills, failure modes, concentration) before ratification. Only MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE and RIBBON_MOMENTUM_GATE have partial disclosures per leaderboard (OOS PASS, real-fills PASS, etc.).
- **Anchor validation for filters**: MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE and RIBBON_MOMENTUM_GATE are filter types; edge_capture N/A but anchor PASS verified. No edge_capture >=771 required for filters per OP-16.
